markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on growth initiatives and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Template Strategy:** The template gallery is a top priority. New portfolio templates ship this week, and the gallery will be linked in the top nav. The long-term vision is a single, unified marketplace for all templates (official, influencer, community).](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Editorial Performance:** Comparison articles are already ranking for high-intent searches like "Lovable vs. Base44" after just 1.5 weeks, despite competitor ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [**GrowthHackers Contract:** The "how-to" pages will be redirected to the homepage. GrowthHackers will pivot to design work for the template project for the remainder of their contract.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [**Team Transition:** Megan (GrowthX Director) will become the primary contact next week. Sam (new Lovable Growth Marketing Lead) will take over SEO/AEO responsibilities from Rachel.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

## Topics

### Template Gallery & Strategy

  - [**New Templates:** 5 new portfolio templates ship by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Portfolio templates target the highest-volume search category (e.g., "artist portfolio").](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [**Cadence:** 5 new templates per week.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Gallery Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [Add a "Websites → Portfolio" category tag for filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
      - [Link the gallery in the top nav for better discoverability.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Influencer/Community Templates:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [**Process:** Influencers create a project → Lovable sends the project link to GrowthX → GrowthX creates the SEO-optimized template page.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Joanna (new Lovable hire) is a potential long-term owner for this initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Unified Template Marketplace:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Vision:** A single gallery for all templates (official, influencer, community).](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Functionality:** Filtering by creator, free/paid status, and category.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [**Distinction:** This is separate from Sebastian's "App Marketplace" project, which targets end-users of apps, not builders.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)

### Editorial & SEO Performance

  - [**Comparison Articles:** 13 articles are live, with strong early results.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Ranking:** Articles are already ranking for high-intent searches like "Lovable vs. Base44" on Perplexity and Sell AI.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is happening despite Base44's heavy ad spend and pro-Base44 content, proving the strategy's effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [**GrowthX AI Visibility Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Function:** An internal platform for granular tracking of search citations and frequency.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To back-engineer AI search results and inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Status:** In progress, due end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**Scope:** Competitive gaps, content, technical SEO, linking, and layout.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Phishing Links:** GrowthX has reported them; Lovable confirmed most are shut down, pending a Google cache refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Team & Project Transitions

  - [**GrowthHackers Contract:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Decision:** Redirect all "how-to" pages to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The pages lack deep user intent and are not additive to the current strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [**Pivot:** GrowthHackers will now assist with design work for the template project.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [**GrowthX Account Lead:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [Megan (GrowthX Director) will become the primary contact next week.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [George will remain available for strategic support.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Lovable Team Roles:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Sam (new Growth Marketing Lead):** Will become the primary GrowthX contact and own all SEO/AEO initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Joanna (new hire):** Will follow up on the user intent analysis and is a potential owner for the template initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [Ship 5 new portfolio templates by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [Complete the technical SEO audit by EOW next week.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [Redirect GrowthHackers' "how-to" pages to the homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
      - [Introduce Megan (new account lead) next week.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Lovable:**](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [Add a top nav link to the template gallery.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Have Joanna follow up on the user intent analysis for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Prepare for Sam (new Growth Marketing Lead) to take over as the primary GrowthX contact.](https://fathom.video/share/HBforDfnytbKP7QZ14nxcJ_Ke8Aw7-Jx?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
